meta.title: Fine Tune Flux Diffusion Models with Your Photos
meta.description:
➡️ Get Life-time Access to the Trelis Scripts (and future improvements): https://Trelis.com/ADVANCED-vision/
➡️ One-click fine-tuning and LLM templates: https://github.com/TrelisResearch/one-click-llms
➡️ Newsletter: https://blog.Trelis.com
➡️ Resources/Support/Discord: https://Trelis.com/About

VIDEO RESOURCES:
- Ostris AI Github Repo for fine-tuning: https://github.com/ostris/ai-toolkit
- FLUX Schnell model: https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.1-schnell
- Slides: https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1M-PtcaL5E8j9_NUpoYi32Jsm4d6tgqtWxinR2tckNys/edit?usp=sharing

TIMESTAMPS:
0:00 Introduction to Fine-tuning Diffusion Models
1:15 Video Overview
2:28 Flux Schnell and Flux Dev Overview
3:37 Picking a GPU for fine-tuning Flux
5:30 Fine-tuning notebooks for diffusion models
7:14 Installation
9:00 Choosing photos for a training dataset
12:45 Running inference before fine-tuning (generating images)
14:25 Tips for running in Google Colab
19:01 Running fine-tuning of Flux Schnell using LoRA
29:58 Setting up tensorboard logging
33:34 Inspecting the training results
35:29 Generating images with your LoRA adapter
39:06 Explaining how diffusion models like FLUX work
39:40 Basic diffusion models
42:00 Diffusion in “latent space”
43:05 How Variational Autoencoders work
46:35 FLUX model architecture - putting it all together (CLIP, T5, transformer, VAE)
48:08 Diffusion steps, Model size, Noise Removal Approaches (Flow), Guided generation
51:20 Video Resources (trelis.com/ADVANCED-vision)
